tasks.title: Create LLM Router contracts
tasks.description: Create back/services/intelligence/llm-router/llmRouterContracts.ts with LlmRouterInput, LlmRouterOutput, LlmRouterResult, LlmRouterConfig types

tasks.title: Create LLM Router prompt template
tasks.description: Create back/services/intelligence/llm-router/llmRouterPrompt.ts with the LLM system prompt for tool classification (transfer/swap/skip/unknown)

tasks.title: Create LLM Router adapter
tasks.description: Create back/services/intelligence/llm-router/llmRouterAdapter.ts with routeToolCall(). Reuse LLM provider pattern from llmDecisionAdapter.ts (same COMPASS_LLM_* env vars). 3s timeout, error fallback to 'unknown'

tasks.title: Wire LLM Decision into transfer path
tasks.description: After evaluateTransferGateway() returns, prepare route-specific sanitized LLM Decision input with amount, recipient, token/SOL, wallet safety validation, gateway decision, and recipient/amount/suspicious-flag risk signals. Call evaluateLlmMetadata() when COMPASS_LLM_DECISION_ENABLED=true and clamp final output so gateway deny cannot loosen

tasks.title: Wire LLM Decision into swap path
tasks.description: After evaluateSwapGateway() returns, prepare route-specific sanitized LLM Decision input with token in/out, amount, slippage, protocol, token risk score, gateway decision, and unknown-token/high-slippage/risky-protocol risk signals. Call evaluateLlmMetadata() when COMPASS_LLM_DECISION_ENABLED=true and clamp final output so gateway deny cannot loosen

tasks.title: Update proxy contracts for routing
tasks.description: Extend mcpProxyContracts.ts if needed to carry routing metadata (ProxyDecision extensions). Add router config types if not covered by router contracts

tasks.title: Update proxy dispatcher with routing hook
tasks.description: Modify mcpProxyDispatcher.ts: after evaluateProxyToolCallPolicy returns 'require_approval' (unknown tools), add optional LLM router hook. If COMPASS_LLM_ROUTER_ENABLED=true, call routeToolCall(). Route: transfer→transferGateway→LLM Decision clamp, swap→swapGateway→LLM Decision clamp, skip→allow, unknown→require_approval. If router is not enabled, keep current behavior

tasks.title: Update audit sink with routing events
tasks.description: Modify mcpProxyAudit.ts to add routing decision audit event types and logging for LLM router calls (tool name, classification, decision, latency, errors)

tasks.title: Write LLM Router unit tests
tasks.description: Create back/services/__tests__/llmRouterAdapter.test.ts. Mock LLM provider. Test: transfer classification, swap classification, skip classification, unknown classification, timeout fallback, invalid JSON fallback, provider error fallback

tasks.title: Write dispatcher routing tests
tasks.description: Add tests in existing test file or new file. Test: router enabled→routes correctly, router disabled→current behavior, router returns unknown→require_approval, router returns skip→allow, transfer/swap routes call gateways before final decision

tasks.title: Final integration verification
tasks.description: Run full test suite. Verify npm run mcp:dev starts. Check no legacy imports. Remove any debug code

tasks.title: Write LLM Decision integration tests
tasks.description: Create or extend dispatcher tests with mocked LLM Decision. Test transfer input preparation, swap input preparation, disabled decision preserves gateway result, gateway deny cannot be loosened, and gateway allow can tighten to require_approval
